hooks.command: node -e "const f=process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH||''; const bad=['text-[#','bg-[#','border-[#']; const found=bad.filter(p=>f&&require('fs').existsSync(f)&&require('fs').readFileSync(f,'utf8').includes(p)); if(found.length){console.error('uvpln: color hardcodeado -- usa un token del design system');process.exit(2);}"

node -e "const f=process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH||''; if(f&&(f.endsWith('.tsx')||f.endsWith('.ts'))){const c=require('fs').existsSync(f)?require('fs').readFileSync(f,'utf8'):''; const n=(c.match(/:\s*any/g)||[]).length; if(n>0)console.warn('uvpln: '+n+' uso(s) de any en '+f+' -- ojo parcero');}"
